query:
UPDATE users SET
                    displayname = COALESCE($2, displayname),
                    avatar_url = COALESCE($3, avatar_url),
                    is_admin = COALESCE($4, is_admin),
                    is_deactivated = COALESCE($5, is_deactivated),
                    user_type = COALESCE($6, user_type),
                    updated_ts = $7
                WHERE username = $1 OR user_id = $1
